title: VoIP Helplful Links
body: Be sure to access these links through Chrome or Firefox, NOT Internet Explorer or EDGE browsers Accessing the below links from an off campus network may require being connected to the Campus VPN . Voicemail: Changing Voicemail PIN: https://kb.wisc.edu/helpdesk/72403 (Default Voicemail PIN 343842) Note: When an employee leaves, if the department manager believes there are voicemails left in the departing users mailbox that are needed, DoIT can assist before resetting the voicemail box and PIN. Voicemail Portal: https://kb.wisc.edu/helpdesk/72618 Accessing Voicemail on Physical Telephone: https://kb.wisc.edu/helpdesk/72655 Email Notification of New Voicemails: https://kb.wisc.edu/72643 Webex Application - Voicemail: https://kb.wisc.edu/115293 Mobile App: The WebEx appp can be used to make and receive calls from your mobile phone. Note: Do not use the WebEx Meetings app, that one is for video conferencing only. WebEx for iOS https://apps.apple.com/us/app/webex/id833967564 WebEx for Android https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.cisco.wx2.android&hl=en_US Phone/ Equipment: SelfCare Portal (Phone settings): https://kb.wisc.edu/helpdesk/72368 Desktop telephone (7841/8851) overview: https://kb.wisc.edu/79548 Identifying Cisco Phones, Headsets and Misc Accessories https://kb.wisc.edu/76152 8831 Conference Phone Overview https://kb.wisc.edu/76051
